query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `schedules` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `userId` int NOT NULL, `date` varchar(10) NOT NULL, `time` varchar(5), `title` text NOT NULL, `description` text, `remindEnabled` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false, `remindAt` timestamp, `reminded` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false, `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CONSTRAINT `schedules_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`))
